nodes.name: 栖息地破坏
nodes.summary: 开发、采伐和围垦等活动导致适宜生境减少。

nodes.name: 智利蜂鸟
nodes.summary: 智利蜂鸟（Chilean woodstar，学名 Eulidia yarrellii），在图谱中标记为极危（CR）物种，已关联2个分布地点节点，主要威胁包括栖息地破坏、农药污染。

nodes.name: 农药污染
nodes.summary: 农业化学品通过水体和食物链影响鸟类生存。

nodes.name: CR
nodes.summary: CR表示 IUCN 极危等级，当前关联174种鸟类，如勺嘴鹬、加州神鹫、菲律宾鹰等174种鸟类。

nodes.name: American Ornithological Society
nodes.summary: American Ornithological Society是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联80种鸟类，包括黑頭鴨、绿翅雁、Chaco chachalaca等80种鸟类，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

nodes.name: 莫克瓜大区
nodes.summary: 莫克瓜大区是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联1种鸟类，包括智利蜂鸟，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

links.label: 分布于
links.evidence: There are also undocumented sight records in Peru in the Tacna Region and possibly Moquegua Region; the South American Classification Committee of the American Ornithological Society considers the species "hypothetical" in that country. The Chilean woodstar inhabits scrub, thickets, and gardens along river valleys of the arid Arica area

links.label: 分布于
links.evidence: There are also undocumented sight records in Peru in the Tacna Region and possibly Moquegua Region; the South American Classification Committee of the American Ornithological Society considers the species "hypothetical" in that country. The Chilean woodstar inhabits scrub, thickets, and gardens along river valleys of the arid Arica area

links.label: 受威胁于
links.evidence: The population has hugely declined since then, with estimates of 1500 individuals in 2003, 1200 in 2007, and 500 in 2012. Habitat loss is the main threat to the Chilean woodstar, with only small patches of suitable native vegetation remaining due to increased conversion to agriculture

links.label: 受威胁于
links.evidence: The effect of pesticides and competition with the Peruvian sheartail are possible threats, but this has not yet been proven
